identity.title: One More Breath [Back To Myself]
identity.styleSentence: At a dramatically slowed tempo of roughly 60 BPM (derived from the measured 123.05), this track features syrupy detuned synths and pitched-down vocal chops gliding over spacious swung 808 drums with heavy sub-bass, creating a thick, hazy southern club atmosphere perfect for late-night car cruises.

lyrics.text:
[Intro - Soft Female Vocal Sample]
Breathe
One more breath
Come back down

[Slow Breakbeat Enters]
[Dusty drum break]
[Deep warm bass]
[Latin guitar loop]

[Vocal Loop 1]
One more breath
Come back down
One more breath
Slow it down

One more breath
Come back down
One more breath
Slow it down

[Instrumental Break]
[Latin guitar repeats]
[Viola and cello swell]
[Low timpani hit]
[Filtered synth glow]

[Vocal Chop]
Breathe in
Breathe out
Breathe in
Breathe out

[Hook Loop]
I’m coming back
Back to myself
I’m coming back
Back to myself

I’m coming back
Back to myself
One more breath
Nothing else

[Instrumental Drop - Slow and Warm]
[Heavy bass groove]
[Chopped breakbeat drums]
[Cello pulse]
[Latin guitar melody]

[Vocal Texture]
Let it move
Let it fade
Let it move
Let it fade

[Bridge - Whispered]
The room gets quiet
The light gets low
I hear my heartbeat
I let it go

[Final Loop]
One more breath
Come back down
One more breath
Slow it down

Breathe in
Breathe out
Breathe in
Breathe out

[Outro]
I’m coming back
Back to myself
One more breath
Nothing else
lyrics.lrc:
[Intro]
[00:10.96] Thank you for watching!

[00:43.80] Thank you for watching!
[01:10.56] Thank you for watching!
[01:42.60] Thank you for watching!
[02:00.00] Thank you for watching!
[Bridge]
[02:30.00] Thank you for watching!
[Drop]
[Outro]
[03:27.18] Thank you for watching!
[03:38.18] Thank you for watching!
[04:00.00] Thank you for watching!

analysis.summary: This track is a hypnotic exploration of late-night introspection and self-discovery, utilizing chopped vocals and slowed tempos to create a woozy atmosphere where the listener confronts their inner thoughts in isolation.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A swirling vortex of dim purple smoke and neon streetlights, blurring into a dreamlike state where time stands still.
Wobbly camera perspective inside a parked car at night, heat haze distorting the view of distant city lights and rain-slicked pavement.
An old cassette tape unraveling in slow motion against a backdrop of grainy 90s suburban decay, colors slightly off and muted.
A collage of shattered glass reflections showing disjointed scenes of partying alone in a dark room, stitched together with rough edges.
Thick fog rolling over abandoned industrial warehouses, silhouettes barely visible through the murk of artificial yellow streetlamps.
Golden viscous liquid dripping slowly from a cracked faucet into a puddle, reflecting distorted images of the sky above.
